title: Trusting the market on AI isn't conservative. It's dangerous
description: FBI Director Kash Patel touted on Monday the “central” role artificial intelligence plays at the federal law enforcement agency.

title: Temasek and Pinegrove Credit Partners Ignite Venture Debt Shockwave as They Launch High-Risk Growth Financing Push Targeting AI and Life Sciences Companies Across Singapore and Silicon Valley
description: [»] Jump to Summary... A new strategic partnership has been announced between Pinegrove Credit Partners and Temasek, marking a coordinated push into venture debt financing for high-growth companies across innovation-driven sectors. The collaboration is designed to expand access to flexible, minimally dilutive capital for emerging businesses operating in fast-scaling technology and life sciences markets. Both [...]

title: Engineers spend a third of their day auditing AI code, report finds
description: 81% of engineering leaders say time saved by AI coding tools now goes to auditing AI-generated code, per a 700-developer survey. Nearly a third of a developer's day is spent reviewing AI output.

title: Reckitt uses AI and predictive modeling to accelerate product development across power brands
description: Reckitt Benckiser now runs over 10,000 virtual experiments annually, up from fewer than 100 three years ago. AI and digital modeling cut costs, sped launches, and grew its innovation pipeline 1.5x since mid-2023.
